title: Prepare a compact verification checklist for replacing stale x-auto drafts after trend search and past-post dedupe. Keep it terse and operational.
summary_text: # Compact verification checklist: x-auto stale-draft replacement (post trend + past-post dedupe) 1. [ ] Lock run context: record trend-search timestamp, lookup window, and input file IDs (run version/hash). 2. [ ] Confirm trend search succeeded and output is non-empty and within expected time range. 3. [ ] Confirm past-post dedupe executed before replacement (log line, count, and dedupe reason set present). 4. [ ] Verify stale candidates list is derived from latest trend output + dedupe results (not manual edits). 5. [ ] Ensure one stale draft maps to exactly one replacement draft/post payload. 6. [ ] For each replacement, verify required fields exist: text, source URL/ID, hashtags/labels, media refs, and post window. 7. [ ] Verify duplicate protection: new draft does not match a recently published post by URL/text hash/title+date within lookback. 8. [ ] Verify stale draft transitions: old draft marked archived/skipped with reason and removed from active queue. 9. [ ] Verify active queue integrity: no duplicate `(source_id, normalized_text_hash)` across queue after replacement. 10. [ ] Verify dedupe exclusions remain: posts in “already-posted” set are not reintroduced. 11. [ ] Verify counts: `stale_total = replaced + intentionally_kept + skipped`, and `replaced` is expected non-negative and sensible. 12. [ ] Verify audit trail: log before/after counts, duplicate counts, and any manual override actions. 13. [ ] Spot-check 3+ items (new, skipped, stale) for policy compliance and language quality. 14. [ ] Final state check: no stale drafts in `ready-to-post`, no duplicate-ready collisions, and schedule state unchanged except intended replacements.
